name: ISharedModel
summary: Represents a shared model in the Tekla Structures environment. Contains metadata such as Id, Name, Code, Description, Owner, creation date, and the current user's sharing role.

properties.name: Code
properties.summary: Gets the code associated with the shared model.

properties.name: CreatedAt
properties.summary: Gets the date and time when the shared model was created.

properties.name: CurrentUserRole
properties.summary: Gets the sharing role of the current user for this model.

properties.name: Description
properties.summary: Gets the description of the shared model.

properties.name: Id
properties.summary: Gets the unique identifier of the shared model.

properties.name: Name
properties.summary: Gets the name of the shared model.

properties.name: Owner
properties.summary: Gets the owner of the shared model.
